title: Chill CobbleMon
description: A Pokemon Cobblemon Pack With Additional mods to enjoy the gameplay.
body:
### A complete rewrite of the orginal Mod pack updated to 1.21.1 using neoforge

**versions from 1.20.1 are not supported anymore.**

This modpack is aimed at chilling around minecraft with pokemon while having everything you need to craft anything you want while at your base with everything automatable

sadly has i'm currently not enjoying pokemon due to the politics and general lack of care from nintendo to the pokemon games this modpack has been discontinued
maybe it will return in the furture who knows
thank you for everyone who tried this pack
